commit_scope: Move GET /api/agent/tasks/active and GET /api/agent/tasks/activity from Python in-memory read handlers into BML front-door native routes.

local_validation.summary: The BML front-door catalog now defines api_agent_tasks_active and api_agent_tasks_activity plus RouteCell rows for the two read paths. The Hostinger Traefik overlay routes both exact public paths to kernel-router-bml-front-door, and deploy verification now requires native router, handler, and python-authority headers.

observed_delta.before_public_probe: Production GET /api/agent/tasks/active returned [] and GET /api/agent/tasks/activity returned {items:[], total:0, limit:50, offset:0} through the FastAPI/Python path with no X-Form-Router header.
observed_delta.local_front_door_probe_active: HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_agent_tasks_active, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and body [].
observed_delta.local_front_door_probe_activity: HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_agent_tasks_activity, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and body {"items":[],"total":0,"limit":50,"offset":0}.
observed_delta.route_goal_state: docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json classifies both /api/agent/tasks/active and /api/agent/tasks/activity as kernel-native-high-grammar with current_source=deploy/front-door/api.bml.

known_limitations.observed: form-kernel-rust check --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml still reports the same 14 unresolved full-catalog names on origin/main and on this branch. Focused local serve proof validates these handlers through the BML front-door serving path.

POST /api/agent/tasks/{task_id}/activity and SSE/task-stream detail paths remain Python-backed. This release moves the observed public read paths; the writer-side native volatile-cell carrier is the next release surface.

deploy_validation.notes: Post-merge deploy must show both public routes return X-Form-Router:native-kernel and X-Form-Python-Authority:false.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public task activity reads are invited into the native BML front door by default instead of being served by FastAPI in-memory handlers.
test_flows: Run the BML front-door router locally and curl both task activity read routes.
Require native router, handler, and python-authority headers.
Require the same empty-public response shapes observed from production before the move.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete. PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before claiming public release.

evidence_refs: deploy/hostinger/auto-deploy.sh::BML front-door agent task activity canary
